description_long: This is a rectangular juice carton labeled 'Faragello Mango Premium Drink', featuring a vibrant blue background with images of ripe, diced mango pieces and water droplets to evoke freshness. The front panel prominently displays the brand name in red and white, with the word 'MANGO' in bold white letters and 'PREMIUM DRINK' below it. The packaging includes a detailed nutritional information panel on one side, and product information in multiple languages on the other. The top of the carton is sealed, with no visible cap or straw opening, suggesting it is a single-use, disposable container. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, suitable for display in urban convenience stores, vending machines, or outdoor refreshment stands.
description: A blue rectangular carton of Faragello Mango Premium Drink, decorated with mango imagery and detailed product labeling. The packaging is vibrant and modern, with clear branding and nutritional information.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Faragello' brand, 'MANGO' label, and vivid mango fruit graphics.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the nutritional information panel in black and white text.
description_view_2: Alternate front view with similar branding and mango imagery as view 0, but with slight variation in text placement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring product information in multiple languages and recycling symbols.
attribute_juice_flavor_illustration: diced mango pieces with water droplets
